reviews.comment:
Como toda estación del ACA excelente, pocas bocas de expendio siempre hay cola

(Translated by Google)
Like any excellent ACA station, there are few service stations and there's always a queue.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKa09UYmhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Uno de los empleados me trató muy mal. Me dijo "seguí adelante, siga para adelante nomás!, que no te vamos a atender, no cargamos bidones" en vez de explicar cómo se debe la razon por la que no se aceptan bidones. Aclaro que en ocasiones anteriores nunca me hicieron problemas por recargar bidones.

(Translated by Google)
One of the employees treated me very poorly. He told me, "Go ahead, just go ahead! We won't serve you, we don't carry cans," instead of explaining the reason for not accepting cans. I should clarify that I've never had any problems with refilling cans in the past.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKNzktbGhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pedí comida para llevar, las hamburguesas con papas fritas muy buenas, las papas caseras, no son las de las otra estaciones de servicio, para tenerlo en cuenta

(Translated by Google)
I ordered takeout; the burgers and fries were very good, and the fries were homemade—not the same as at other gas stations, something to keep in mind.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKMDVLdDBRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Me gusto la atención del personal me gustó qué el lugar estaba muy limpio al igual que los sanitarios. Fue un lugar lindo de visitar !!

(Translated by Google)
I liked the staff's attention. I liked that the place was very clean, as were the restrooms. It was a nice place to visit!
